License Transfer Tool

Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity by State

Compare compact participation, endorsement fees, fingerprint rules, temporary license availability, and current transfer timelines before you commit to a state.

How to use this directory

Start with path type first: compact, endorsement, or CDR State. Then sort by fee and timeline to shortlist states with the fastest path to your next assignment.
